description_long: This is a plush, rounded stuffed toy with a deep teal blue color and a soft, velvety texture. The toy features two prominent, flexible antennae on top of its head and four small, stubby legs underneath its body, giving it a whimsical, bug-like appearance. Its body is plump and slightly flattened, with a smooth, seamless surface and subtle shading that suggests a soft, squeezable filling. The underside reveals a pair of small, round eyes and a few additional nubs that may represent feet or sensory organs. The overall design is simple and cartoonish, with no visible seams or clothing, and the toy exudes a friendly, approachable vibe. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it ideal for children to carry or cuddle in urban parks, playgrounds, or home environments.
description: A plush, teal blue stuffed toy with antennae and stubby legs, resembling a whimsical bug. Its soft, rounded body and simple features give it a friendly, cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded body, two upright antennae, and a small nub at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the plump, oval shape, one antenna visible upright, and four small legs underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two antennae angled outward, with small round eyes and nubs visible underneath.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the curve of the body, one antenna, and the arrangement of the legs and nubs.
attribute_facial_expression: The toy has a neutral, friendly expression with small, round eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a relaxed, resting posture with its body slightly flattened and antennae raised, legs tucked underneath.
